title: Fmr. ASML CEO Martin van den Brink steps down from chip maker ASMI's supervisory board
title_zh: 前ASML首席执行官马丁·范登布林克辞去芯片制造商ASMI监事会职务
description: Former ASML CEO Martin van den Brink has stepped down as a Supervisory Board member at chip supplier ASMI with immediate effect.
description_zh: ASML前首席执行官马丁·范登布林克已辞去芯片供应商ASMI监事会成员职务，即刻生效。

title: Parliament wants gov’t to intervene in fire brigade conditions test after deaths
title_zh: 议会要求政府介入消防队条件测试，此前发生多起死亡事件
description: The Tweede Kamer is demanding that the Dutch cabinet overhaul the controversial medical examinations for firefighters as quickly as possible after research revealed the tests triggered heart failur
description_zh: 荷兰下议院要求内阁尽快改革备受争议的消防员体检制度，此前有研究表明，这些体检会引发心脏衰竭。

title: Police arrest 17 in Utrecht and 17 in Arnhem during King’s Night
title_zh: 国王之夜期间，乌得勒支和阿纳姆分别有17人被警方逮捕。
description: Police arrested 17 people in Utrecht and another 17 in Arnhem during King's Night festivities, authorities said, even as both cities described the celebrations as relatively calm despite large crow
description_zh: 警方称，在国王之夜庆祝活动期间，乌得勒支和阿纳姆分别逮捕了17人和17人。尽管人群熙熙攘攘，但两座城市都表示庆祝活动相对平静。

title: Amsterdam warns: stay away from overcrowded Bijlmerplein, Reestraat and Bloemgracht
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹警告：远离过度拥挤的 Bijlmerplein、Reestraat 和 Bloemgracht
description: Amsterdam officials warned at 5 p.m.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹官员下午5点发出警告

title: Princess Ariane reveals she will study aerospace engineering at TU Delft
title_zh: 阿丽亚娜公主透露，她将在代尔夫特理工大学攻读航空航天工程专业。
description: Princess Ariane announced Monday that she will begin studying aerospace engineering at TU Delft after the summer vacation, revealing the news during King's Day celebrations in Dokkum.
description_zh: 阿丽亚娜公主周一宣布，她将在暑假结束后进入代尔夫特理工大学学习航空航天工程。她在多库姆举行的国王节庆祝活动上透露了这一消息。

title: Philips lighting spin-off Signify reports sharp profit drop on weak demand
title_zh: 飞利浦照明分拆公司昕诺飞(Signify)报告称，由于需求疲软，利润大幅下滑。
description: Signify, the lighting manufacturer from Eindhoven, is expecting difficult market conditions to continue through the rest of the year as it grapples with weaker demand and the impact of U.S.
description_zh: 总部位于埃因霍温的照明制造商昕诺飞(Signify)预计，由于需求疲软和美国经济衰退的影响，艰难的市场环境将持续到今年年底。

title: More Dutch say they’d rather have a King than risk getting a "type like Trump"
title_zh: 更多荷兰人表示，他们宁愿保留国王，也不愿冒着出现“像特朗普那样的人”的风险。
description: Amid persistent global unpredictability, Dutch support for the monarchy has risen sharply, with some reportedly explicitly saying they prefer a king over the risk of getting “a type like Trump” as
description_zh: 在全球局势持续动荡的背景下，荷兰民众对君主制的支持率大幅上升，据报道，一些人明确表示，他们宁愿保留国王，也不愿冒着出现“像特朗普那样的人”的风险。

title: Willem-Alexander thanks Dokkum for a wonderful King's Day
title_zh: 威廉-亚历山大感谢多库姆举办了一场精彩的国王节庆祝活动。
description: King Willem-Alexander thanked Dokkum and Friesland for showing him and his family an “unforgettable” King’s Day today on his 59th birthday.
description_zh: 威廉-亚历山大国王感谢多库姆和弗里斯兰为他和他的家人在他59岁生日之际带来了一个“难忘的”国王节。

title: "Ultrafast" fashion booms on King’s Day, fueling overconsumption warnings
title_zh: 国王节期间，“超快时尚”蓬勃发展，引发过度消费担忧
description: Clothing retailers across the Netherlands are heavily promoting special orange collections for King's Day, a trend that experts say symbolizes the fashion industry's acceleration into "ultrafast" f
description_zh: 荷兰各地的服装零售商都在大力推广国王节的橙色特别系列，专家表示，这一趋势象征着时尚产业正加速向“超快时尚”转型。

title: Utrecht, Eindhoven and Breda turn away King's Day crowds as squares reach capacity
title_zh: 乌得勒支、埃因霍温和布雷达在国王节当天拒绝人群进入，因为广场已人满为患。
description: Utrecht, Eindhoven, and Breda are turning away King's Day crowds on Monday after central squares in all three cities reached capacity.
description_zh: 由于乌得勒支、埃因霍温和布雷达这三个城市的中心广场都已达到容纳人数上限，因此周一国王节当天，这三个城市将拒绝人群入内。

title: Royals mark King’s Day with Frisian sports in Dokkum
title_zh: 在多库姆，皇室成员以弗里斯兰传统运动庆祝国王节
description: The royal family has concluded its visit to Dokkum in Friesland, where the king and queen ice skated in the...
description_zh: 王室成员结束了对弗里斯兰省多库姆的访问，国王和王后在那里滑冰……

title: Rotterdam mayor uses King’s Night to call attention to women’s safety
title_zh: 鹿特丹市长利用国王之夜呼吁关注女性安全问题
description: On King’s Night, Mayor Carola Schouten of Rotterdamposted a videoon social media, calling attention to women’s safety on the s
description_zh: 在国王之夜，鹿特丹市长卡罗拉·舒滕在社交媒体上发布了一段视频，呼吁人们关注女性在公共场所的安全问题。

title: NS turns to AI to cut train electricity use as Dutch power grid is overloaded
title_zh: 由于荷兰电网负荷过重，NS公司转向人工智能以降低列车用电量。
description: Dutch railway operator NS is developing an AI system to advise train drivers on when to accelerate and coast, reducing electricity use on the overloaded national power grid.
description_zh: 荷兰铁路运营商 NS 正在开发一套人工智能系统，为火车司机提供何时加速和滑行的建议，以减少超负荷运转的国家电网的电力消耗。

title: Tweede Kamer calls for free laptops for all secondary school students
title_zh: 瑞典议会下院呼吁为所有中学生免费提供笔记本电脑
description: A majority in the Dutch Tweede Kamer wants the government to investigate whether laptops and tablets should be provided free to secondary school students by expanding the existing free schoolbooks
description_zh: 荷兰下议院多数议员希望政府调查是否应该通过扩大现有的免费教科书范围，向中学生免费提供笔记本电脑和平板电脑。

title: Transavia scrapping flights over May holiday season due to high kerosine prices
title_zh: 由于煤油价格高企，泛航航空取消了五月假期期间的航班。
description: Transavia is cancelling multiple flights in May and June due to the high kerosene prices.
description_zh: 由于煤油价格高企，泛航航空取消了五月和六月的多趟航班。

title: At least one hurt in Amsterdam shooting early on King's Day morning
title_zh: 国王节清晨，阿姆斯特丹发生枪击事件，至少一人受伤。
description: At least one man was injured in a shooting in Amsterdam-West on Monday morning.
description_zh: 周一上午，阿姆斯特丹西区发生枪击事件，至少一名男子受伤。

title: Pro-republic group can't place giant dinosaur on King's Day route in Dokkum, court rules
title_zh: 法院裁定，支持共和制的团体不得在多库姆的国王节路线上放置巨型恐龙。
description: The anti-monarchy group Republiek cannot put a 10-meter-tall inflatable dinosaur king on the Royals’ King’s Day route in Dokkum, the court ruled.
description_zh: 法院裁定，反君主制组织“共和国”不能在多库姆的国王节路线上放置一个 10 米高的充气恐龙国王。

title: Amsterdam struggling to shake image that "anything goes" on King’s Day
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹正努力摆脱国王节“一切皆可”的刻板印象。
description: Amsterdam is trying to get rid of its “anything goes” on King’s Day image, but it is a hard one to shake.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹正努力摆脱国王节“无所顾忌”的形象，但这很难改变。

title: Dutch midfielder Simons will miss the World Cup after serious knee ligament tear
title_zh: 荷兰中场球员西蒙斯因膝盖韧带严重撕裂将缺席世界杯。
description: Dutch midfielder Xavi Simons will miss the World Cup after tearing a key ligament in his knee, the anterior cruciate ligament, or ACL— a serious injury that requires surgery and months of recovery,
description_zh: 荷兰中场球员哈维·西蒙斯因膝盖前十字韧带（ACL）撕裂将缺席世界杯——这是一种严重的伤病，需要手术和数月的康复。

title: Loosdrecht reduces capacity of refugee shelter after riots
title_zh: 骚乱后，洛斯德雷赫特减少了难民收容所的容量
description: Council officials in Loosdrecht have cut the capacity of an asylum seekers’ shelter from 110 beds to 70 following several...
description_zh: 洛斯德雷赫特市议会官员在发生数起事件后，将一家难民收容所的床位从110张削减至70张……

title: Cabinet eases rules on shooting “problem” wolves
title_zh: 内阁放宽射杀“问题”狼的规定
description: The Dutch cabinet will make it easier for local authorities to shoot wolves that have become a threat to people...
description_zh: 荷兰内阁将简化地方当局射杀对人构成威胁的狼的程序……

title: Half of Dutch think monarchy is too expensive, survey shows
title_zh: 调查显示，半数荷兰人认为君主制成本过高。
description: Almost half of Dutch people believe the monarchy costs too much, with criticism highest among the young, according to the...
description_zh: 据报道，近一半的荷兰人认为君主制成本过高，其中年轻人的批评声最为强烈……

title: Mass arrests following motorway climate protest near Utrecht
title_zh: 乌得勒支附近高速公路气候抗议活动后发生大规模逮捕事件
description: Police have arrested around 400 people after the A12 motorway near Utrecht was blocked by a climate change demonstration on...
description_zh: 警方逮捕了约400人，此前乌得勒支附近的A12高速公路被一场气候变化示威活动封锁……

title: Solvinity contract to be extended despite US takeover fears
title_zh: 尽管存在美国收购担忧，Solvinity的合同仍将延长。
description: The Dutch government has extended the contract with cloud firm Solvinity to run its online access portal DigiD despite widespread...
description_zh: 尽管疫情形势严峻，荷兰政府仍与云服务公司Solvinity续签了合同，继续运营其在线访问门户网站DigiD。

title: Dutch mayors escalate clash with Germany over border checks after latest fatal crash
title_zh: 在最新一起致命车祸后，荷兰市长与德国就边境检查问题升级冲突。
description: Dutch mayors are sharply increasing pressure on Germany over its border controls with the Netherlands, arguing the measures are causing dangerous congestion, economic damage, and repeated accidents
description_zh: 荷兰市长们正加大力度向德国施压，要求其停止对荷兰实施的边境管制措施。他们认为，这些措施造成了危险的交通拥堵、经济损失和事故频发。

title: Support for Dutch Royals and monarchy stable; More criticism of costs
title_zh: 对荷兰王室和君主制的支持保持稳定；对成本的批评增多。
description: Both support for the monarchy and the ratings for King Willem-Alexander, Queen Maxima, and Princess Amalia remained stable this year after recent years’ slight increase, according to the
description_zh: 根据调查，在经历了近几年的略微上升之后，今年民众对君主制的支持率以及威廉-亚历山大国王、马克西玛王后和阿玛莉亚公主的支持率均保持稳定。

title: King's Night celebrations crowded, but mostly festive; Fights in Apeldoorn and Almere
title_zh: 国王之夜庆祝活动人潮涌动，但总体气氛喜庆；阿珀尔多伦和阿尔梅勒举行斗殴
description: King’s Night celebrations throughout the Netherlands were well attended, despite the cold weather. Utrecht had to call on people to stop coming to the city.
description_zh: 尽管天气寒冷，荷兰各地的国王之夜庆祝活动依然热闹非凡。乌得勒支不得不呼吁人们不要前往该市。

title: King's Day to be pleasant, with periods of sun; Temps up to 19 degrees
title_zh: 国王日天气宜人，阳光充足；气温最高可达19度。
description: The Netherlands iscelebrating King Willem-Alexander’s 59th birthday to
description_zh: 荷兰正在庆祝国王威廉-亚历山大59岁生日。

title: Police van on its side in collision with drunk driver; At least 3 King's Night accidents
title_zh: 警车与醉驾司机相撞侧翻；国王之夜至少发生3起交通事故
description: A police van ended up on its side in Rozenburg after a collision with a drunk driver early Monday morning.
description_zh: 周一清晨，一辆警车在罗森堡与一名醉酒司机相撞后侧翻。

title: King’s Night crowds force several cities to shut squares
title_zh: 国王之夜人潮涌动，迫使多个城市关闭广场。
description: Several Dutch cities closed off central squares to new visitors on Sunday evening as King’s Night crowds reached capacity. Police...
description_zh: 周日晚间，由于国王之夜人潮拥挤，荷兰多个城市封闭了中心广场，禁止新游客进入。警方……

title: Koningsdag begins nationwide as royal family heads to Dokkum for official celebration
title_zh: 王位日（Koningsdag）在全国范围内拉开帷幕，王室成员前往多库姆参加官方庆祝活动。
description: Koningsdag will begin unfolding across the Netherlands on Monday morning with nationwide street markets, city-center celebrations, and large-scale public gatherings with seasonably bright spring co
description_zh: 荷兰国王节将于周一上午在全国各地拉开帷幕，届时将有全国各地的街头集市、市中心庆祝活动以及大型公共集会，并伴有明媚的春日色彩。

title: Dutch strawberry consumption hits record high in 2025 at 2.8 kilograms per person
title_zh: 预计到2025年，荷兰草莓消费量将达到历史新高，人均消费量为2.8公斤。
description: The Netherlands recorded its highest-ever strawberry consumption in 2025, according to trade association GroentenFruit Huis.
description_zh: 据行业协会 GroentenFruit Huis 称，荷兰在 2025 年创下了草莓消费量的历史新高。

title: Feyenoord open up gap in race for second as Twente and NEC draw
title_zh: 费耶诺德在第二名争夺战中拉开差距，特温特和NEC战平
description: Feyenoord took a big step towards securing a place in next year’s Champions League with a resolute 3-1 win at...
description_zh: 费耶诺德凭借一场酣畅淋漓的3-1胜利，向着锁定下赛季欧冠席位迈出了重要一步……

title: Former staff allege physical abuse at now-bankrupt dementia care facility in Rumpt
title_zh: 前员工指控位于朗普特的一家现已破产的痴呆症护理机构存在虐待行为。
description: At the now-bankrupt Linge’s Zorglandgoed in Rumpt, in Gelderland province, former staff and families allege a pattern of abuse and intimidation involving vulnerable dementia patients, including an
description_zh: 在海尔德兰省鲁姆普特镇现已破产的林格养老院，前员工和家属指控该养老院存在虐待和恐吓弱势痴呆症患者的模式，其中包括一名……

title: Heracles Almelo relegated from the Eredivisie after 2-0 home defeat to FC Volendam
title_zh: 赫拉克勒斯阿尔梅洛在主场0-2负于沃伦丹足球俱乐部后，从荷甲联赛降级。
description: After three seasons in the Eredivisie, Heracles Almelo has been relegated.
description_zh: 在荷甲联赛征战三个赛季后，赫拉克勒斯阿尔梅洛队降级了。

title: Koningsdag in Veen canceled after cyclist killed in Wijk en Aalburg crash
title_zh: 自行车手在阿尔堡韦克车祸中丧生后，维恩的国王节被取消
description: A 34-year-old man from Veen was killed last Sunday in Wijk en Aalburg after being struck by a speeding car on Maasdijk, prompting the cancellation of all Koningsdag celebrations in his home village
description_zh: 上周日，一名来自维恩的34岁男子在维克恩阿尔堡的马斯代克路被一辆超速行驶的汽车撞倒身亡，导致他家乡的所有国王节庆祝活动都被取消。

title: Jos Verstappen, Max Verstappen’s father, suffers rollover crash in Belgian rally
title_zh: 马克斯·维斯塔潘的父亲约斯·维斯塔潘在比利时拉力赛中遭遇翻车事故
description: Jos Verstappen, 54, the father of Formula 1 driver Max Verstappen, crashed and rolled over Sunday during the Rallye des Wallonie in Belgium after his Skoda struck a pole, RTL
description_zh: 据RTL报道，一级方程式赛车手马克斯·维斯塔潘的父亲，54岁的约斯·维斯塔潘，周日在比利时瓦隆尼拉力赛中驾驶的斯柯达赛车撞上杆子后发生翻车事故。

title: 23-year-old man shot in West Amsterdam; Suspect flees on foot toward A10
title_zh: 一名23岁男子在阿姆斯特丹西部遭枪击；嫌犯徒步逃往A10公路方向。
description: A 23-year-old man was shot on Friday afternoon following a dispute on the Admiraal de Ruijterweg near the Haarlemmerweg in West Amsterdam, police said.
description_zh: 警方称，周五下午，一名 23 岁男子在阿姆斯特丹西部的哈勒姆路附近的阿德米拉尔·德·鲁伊特路与人发生争执后被枪击。

title: Parachutist dies in Rhoon after resuscitation fails
title_zh: 一名跳伞员在鲁恩地区抢救无效身亡
description: A parachutist died Sunday morning in Rhoon, Zuid-Holland, after an attempted resuscitation failed, Noordhollands Dagblad
description_zh: 据《Noordhollands Dagblad》报道，周日上午，一名跳伞员在南荷兰省鲁恩市经抢救无效后死亡。

title: Dutch authorities warn of rising sextortion cases involving younger victims
title_zh: 荷兰当局警告称，涉及年轻受害者的性勒索案件正在增加。
description: Dutch authorities and support organizations are raising alarm over a sharp rise in sextortion cases, warning that incidents are becoming more severe and increasingly targeting younger victims, some
description_zh: 荷兰当局和援助组织对性勒索案件的急剧增加发出警报，警告称这些案件的性质越来越严重，受害者也越来越年轻。

title: Five injured as fire engine and taxi collide on N35
title_zh: N35公路发生消防车与出租车相撞事故，造成五人受伤。
description: Five people were injured after a collision between a fire engine and a taxi on the N35 near Wierden, prompting a full closure of the road between Wierden and Nijverdal in both directions, RTV Oost
description_zh: 据RTV Oost报道，在维尔登附近的N35国道上，一辆消防车与一辆出租车相撞，造成五人受伤，导致维尔登和奈弗达尔之间的路段双向完全封闭。

title: Woman, 45, arrested after stabbing in Veendam home; Victim lightly injured
title_zh: 一名45岁女子在维恩丹家中持刀伤人后被捕；受害者轻伤
description: A person was stabbed Sunday morning inside a home on Middenweg in Veendam, leaving the victim with minor injuries and leading to the arrest of a 45-year-old local woman, RTV Noord
description_zh: 周日早上，芬丹米登路一处住宅内发生一起持刀伤人事件，受害者受轻伤，一名45岁的当地女子被捕。RTV Noord报道。

title: Dutch reporter describes chaos after gunfire at White House Correspondents’ dinner
title_zh: 荷兰记者描述白宫记者晚宴枪击事件后的混乱场面
description: The shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner at the Washington Hilton in Washington, D.C., which triggered the evacuation of President Donald Trump, Vice President JD Vance, s
description_zh: 在华盛顿特区华盛顿希尔顿酒店举行的白宫记者协会晚宴上发生的枪击事件，导致唐纳德·特朗普总统、副总统JD·万斯等人紧急撤离。

title: Dutch prosecutors double reward in 25-year-old Rotterdam sexual assault and murder case
title_zh: 荷兰检方将25年前鹿特丹性侵谋杀案的悬赏金额提高一倍
description: The Dutch Public Prosecution Service has doubled the reward for the key tip in the 2001 killing of Mariska Klompenhouwer in Rotterdam, police
description_zh: 荷兰公共检察署将2001年鹿特丹玛丽斯卡·克洛彭豪尔谋杀案关键线索的悬赏金额提高了一倍。

title: Koningsnacht set to bring nationwide celebrations ahead of Koningsdag on Monday
title_zh: Koningsnacht 将在周一的国王节之前举行全国性的庆祝活动
description: Koningsnacht begins Sunday evening, April 26, with parties, festivals, and club nights taking place all over the country as Dutch cities prepare for Koningsdag on Monday, April 27, when the
description_zh: 国王之夜（Koningsnacht）将于4月26日星期日晚间拉开帷幕，全国各地将举办派对、节日和夜店活动，荷兰各大城市都在为4月27日星期一的国王日（Koningsdag）做准备。

title: CDA demands takedown of websites sharing drugging tips and rape videos
title_zh: CDA要求关闭分享下药技巧和强奸视频的网站
description: The Christian Democratic Appeal (CDA) party in the Tweede Kamer is demanding that websites offering tips on drugging women and videos of men raping their unconscious partners be taken offline and t
description_zh: 基督教民主呼吁党（CDA）在下议院要求关闭提供下药迷奸女性技巧的网站以及男性强奸昏迷伴侣的视频。

title: Arrests top 400 at Extinction Rebellion's A12 blockade, double initial police estimate
title_zh: “反抗灭绝”组织封锁A12公路的逮捕人数超过400人，是警方最初估计的两倍。
description: More than 400 demonstrators were arrested Saturday during a climate protest on the A12 highway near Utrecht, police said, revising an earlier estimate of just over
description_zh: 警方称，周六在乌得勒支附近A12高速公路举行的气候抗议活动中，超过400名示威者被捕，这一数字修正了此前略高于1000人的估计。

title: 1 dead in 7-car crash on A12 near German border
title_zh: A12公路靠近德国边境路段发生7车连环相撞事故，1人死亡。
description: One person was killed in a chain-reaction crash involving seven vehicles on the A12 near the German border near Babberich.
description_zh: 在巴伯里希附近靠近德国边境的 A12 公路上，发生一起涉及七辆车的连环车祸，造成一人死亡。

title: Police officer shoots suspect in Goes after report of possible firearm
title_zh: 警方接到可能涉及枪支的报告后，开枪击中一名嫌疑人。
description: A police shooting in Goes overnight left a man wounded after officers responded to a report of a disturbance in which a firearm may have been involved, NOS
description_zh: 昨晚，戈斯镇发生一起警方枪击事件，一名男子受伤。此前，警方接到报警称发生骚乱，可能涉及枪支。

title: King’s Day 2026: tighter rules, fines and a Frisian visit
title_zh: 2026年国王节：更严格的规定、罚款和一次弗里斯兰之旅
description: The Netherlands is gearing up for its biggest annual celebration on Monday as the reigning monarch, Willem-Alexander, turns 59 years...
description_zh: 荷兰正紧锣密鼓地筹备一年一度的盛大庆典，现任国王威廉-亚历山大将于周一迎来59岁生日……

title: Rotterdam theme park that never opened sold for €6.5 million
title_zh: 从未开业的鹿特丹主题公园以650万欧元的价格售出
description: The incomplete Rivoli amusement park in Rotterdam was sold on Tuesday in an online auction, with the highest bid reaching 6.5 million euros.
description_zh: 位于鹿特丹的未完工的里沃利游乐园于周二在网上拍卖中售出，最高出价达到 650 万欧元。

title: Dutch Supreme Court often gives no reasons for rejected appeals, data show
title_zh: 数据显示，荷兰最高法院驳回上诉时通常不给出理由。
description: Most people who lose cases before the Dutch Supreme Court, the Hoge Raad, are not told why, according to new figures from the court, prompting criticism from legal experts.
description_zh: 根据法院最新公布的数据，大多数在荷兰最高法院（Hoge Raad）败诉的人都不知道败诉原因，这引发了法律专家的批评。

title: Amsterdam youth center in Slotervaart closed for six months after two explosions
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹斯洛特瓦特青年中心因两起爆炸事件关闭六个月
description: A youth center in Slotervaart, in Amsterdam Nieuw-West, will be closed for six months after two separate explosions on April 19 and April 23 prompted safety concerns, Mayor Femke Halsema announced.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹新西区斯洛特瓦特的一家青年中心在 4 月 19 日和 4 月 23 日发生两起爆炸事件，引发安全担忧，市长费姆克·哈尔塞玛宣布，该中心将关闭六个月。

title: Sale of Wassenaar Nazi bunker delayed after confidentiality breach probe
title_zh: 瓦瑟纳尔纳粹地堡出售因泄密调查而推迟
description: The planned sale of the former Nazi bunker Commandopost Clingendael in Wassenaar has been delayed twice over the past two months amid an integrity investigation into a possible confidentiality brea
description_zh: 过去两个月里，由于一项关于可能存在泄密行为的诚信调查，原定出售位于瓦瑟纳尔的前纳粹地堡克林根达尔突击队哨所的交易已被推迟两次。

title: Amsterdam restaurant reopens after rat infestation, but owner plans to sell it soon
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹一家餐厅在鼠患后重新开业，但老板计划很快将其出售。
description: A restaurant on Javastraat in Amsterdam-Oost thatwas closedat the end of March by
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹东区 Javastraat 的一家餐厅于 3 月底关闭

title: Violent anti-asylum protests prompt Loosdrecht to cut asylum intake
title_zh: 暴力反庇护抗议活动促使洛斯德雷赫特削减庇护申请接收数量。
description: Authorities in Wijdemeren have reduced the number of asylum seekers housed in a temporary emergency shelter in Loosdrecht and delayed its opening following days of unrest, including violent protest
description_zh: 在经历了数日的动荡（包括暴力抗议）后，维德梅伦当局减少了洛斯德雷赫特临时紧急避难所内收容的寻求庇护者人数，并推迟了该避难所的开放时间。

title: Sunny weekend to give way to cooler Koningsdag with slight risk of northern shower
title_zh: 阳光明媚的周末过后，国王日气温将有所下降，北部地区有小概率出现阵雨。
description: The Netherlands will remain in a prolonged dry period through the weekend, with mostly sunny conditions on Saturday and Sunday, followed by a cooler Koningsdag on Monday.
description_zh: 荷兰将持续干旱至周末，周六和周日大部分时间晴朗，周一国王日气温将有所下降。

title: Dutch police arrest over 200 after XR blocks A12 near De Meern
title_zh: 荷兰警方逮捕了200多人，此前“反抗灭绝”（XR）组织封锁了德梅尔恩附近的A12公路。
description: Police arrested more than 200 demonstrators after climate activists from Extinction Rebellion (XR) blocked the A12 near De Meern, close to Utrecht, while a separate group of six drivers was also de
description_zh: 在“反抗灭绝”（Extinction Rebellion，简称XR）气候活动人士封锁了乌得勒支附近德梅尔恩（De Meern）的A12公路后，警方逮捕了200多名示威者，另有六名司机也遭到逮捕。

title: Dutch cabinet extends DigiD contractor contract despite U.S. takeover concerns
title_zh: 尽管存在美国收购担忧，荷兰内阁仍延长了与DigiD的承包商合同。
description: The Dutch cabinet will extend its contract withIT firm Solvinity, which op
description_zh: 荷兰政府将与IT公司Solvinity续签合同。

title: More students leave high school tracks for vocational education as dropout concerns grow
title_zh: 随着辍学问题日益严重，越来越多的学生放弃高中教育，转而接受职业教育。
description: A rising number of Dutch secondary school students are leaving havo and vwo programs without diplomas to pursue vocational education, while separate data highlight concerns about high dropout rates
description_zh: 越来越多的荷兰中学生在未获得高中毕业文凭的情况下离开HAVO和VWO课程，转而选择职业教育，与此同时，另有数据显示，高辍学率令人担忧。

title: YouTube prank caller’s channel goes offline after prank call linked to fatal shooting
title_zh: YouTube恶作剧电话主播的频道因一起与致命枪击案有关的恶作剧电话而被下架。
description: The YouTube channel of prank caller Rouand Saadoen has gone offline after he admitted involvement in a hoax phone call that prosecutors say helped lead to a
description_zh: 恶作剧电话制造者鲁安德·萨多恩的YouTube频道已下线，此前他承认参与了一通虚假电话，检察官称该电话导致了一起……

title: Amsterdam stock exchange recovers, ends week on tech gains
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹股市反弹，科技股领涨，本周收盘走高。
description: The Amsterdam AEX index closed higher on Friday, recovering from a loss a day earlier, with strong gains in Adyen and Besi leading trading on the Damrak, as broader European markets in Frankfurt, P
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹AEX指数周五收高，收复了前一日的跌势。Adyen和Besi的强劲上涨领涨达姆拉克交易所，而法兰克福、巴黎等欧洲其他市场也呈现上涨趋势。

title: Back-to-back dry springs leave Netherlands with early drought signs, rising water stress
title_zh: 荷兰连续两个春季干旱，导致旱情提前出现，用水压力日益加剧。
description: The Netherlands is experiencing a second consecutive unusually dry spring, with virtually no rainfall, rising temperatures, and increasing evaporation already pushing parts of the country toward ea
description_zh: 荷兰正经历连续第二个异常干燥的春季，几乎没有降雨，气温上升，蒸发量增加，已使该国部分地区面临干旱。

title: Dutch tax deadline looms: Late filers face fines up to €6,709
title_zh: 荷兰税款申报截止日期临近：逾期申报者将面临最高 6,709 欧元的罚款
description: The final weekend before the May 1 deadline for filing income tax in the Netherlands has begun, with authorities warning that late submissions can trigger fines up to 6,709 euros and other penaltie
description_zh: 荷兰所得税申报截止日期为5月1日，距离截止日期仅剩最后一个周末。当局警告称，逾期申报可能面临最高6709欧元的罚款以及其他处罚。

title: Schiedam shop fire forces evacuations; Two hospitalized for smoke inhalation
title_zh: 斯希丹一家商店发生火灾，导致人员疏散；两人因吸入浓烟入院治疗。
description: Several homes were evacuated early Saturday after a fire broke out in the basement of a shop on Rotterdamsedijk, according to the regional safety authority.
description_zh: 据地区安全部门称，周六清晨，鹿特丹塞迪克一家商店的地下室发生火灾，导致几户居民被疏散。

title: Snacking specifically at night increases risk of diabetes, weight gain, study finds
title_zh: 研究发现，夜间吃零食会增加患糖尿病和体重增加的风险。
description: Snacking in the evening might seem harmless, but it goes against the body’s natural biological rhythm.
description_zh: 晚上吃零食看似无害，但却违背了人体的自然生物节律。

title: Nine Dutch men arrested for 10 ATM explosions in Germany and Switzerland
title_zh: 九名荷兰男子因在德国和瑞士制造十起自动取款机爆炸案被捕
description: Dutch police arrested nine Dutch men suspected of belonging to a criminal gang that carried out about 10 ATM explosions in Germany and Switzerland between 2023 and 2025, authorities said.
description_zh: 荷兰警方逮捕了九名荷兰男子，他们涉嫌隶属于一个犯罪团伙，该团伙在 2023 年至 2025 年间在德国和瑞士实施了约 10 起自动取款机爆炸案。

title: Three fire station break-ins reported in Oss in one week
title_zh: 奥斯镇一周内报告了三起消防站闯入事件。
description: A series of burglaries at three fire stations in Oss this week, combined with a broader pattern of break-ins across Noord-Brabant in recent months, has raised concerns among authorities.
description_zh: 本周奥斯镇三座消防站发生一系列盗窃案，再加上近几个月来北布拉班特省各地普遍出现的入室盗窃案，引起了当局的担忧。

title: 365 kilos of cocaine in household shipment from Curaçao leads to four arrests in Lochem
title_zh: 洛赫姆警方查获从库拉索岛寄出的365公斤可卡因，导致四人被捕。
description: Dutch authorities have arrested four suspects in Lochem after uncovering 365 kilograms of cocaine hidden in a shipment of household goods from Curaçao, a seizure that adds to a larger haul of 1,400
description_zh: 荷兰当局在洛赫姆逮捕了四名嫌疑人，此前他们在一批来自库拉索的家用物品中查获了365公斤可卡因。此次查获的毒品数量是此前缴获的1400公斤可卡因的更大宗案件的一部分。

title: Man sentenced to 28 years in absentia over 2015 Krommenie shooting and Berlin plot
title_zh: 男子因2015年克罗梅尼枪击案和柏林阴谋案被缺席判处28年监禁
description: A court has sentenced a 45-year-old man in absentia to 28 years in prison for his role in the 2015 murder of Eaneas Lomp in Krommenie.
description_zh: 一名 45 岁的男子因参与 2015 年在克罗梅尼发生的埃尼亚斯·隆普谋杀案，被法院缺席判处 28 年监禁。

title: Men more likely to make ends meet; Also more likely to have debt
title_zh: 男性更容易维持生计；也更容易负债。
description: Men in the Netherlands are more likely than women to make ends meet, have money left over at the end of the month and pay their bills without problems, a Deloitte study has found.
description_zh: 德勤的一项研究发现，荷兰男性比女性更有可能收支平衡，月底还有剩余的钱，并且能够顺利支付账单。

title: Two Schiphol workers arrested for driving under influence of cannabis
title_zh: 两名史基浦机场工作人员因吸食大麻后驾车被捕
description: Two employees were arrested at Schiphol on Friday for driving while under the influence.
description_zh: 周五，两名员工因酒后驾车在史基浦机场被捕。

title: 10% of Dutch food waste caused by confusion over best before date
title_zh: 荷兰10%的食物浪费是由于对最佳食用日期的误解造成的。
description: Every resident of the Netherlands throws away an average of 116 kilograms of food each year, with more than 2 billion kilograms discarded across the entire supply chain from production to consumer,
description_zh: 荷兰每位居民每年平均丢弃116公斤食物，从生产到消费的整个供应链中，每年丢弃的食物超过20亿公斤。

title: More Dutch crossing the border to fuel up in Belgium: ABN Amro
title_zh: 更多荷兰人跨境前往比利时加油：荷兰银行
description: Dutch motorists are increasingly crossing the border to fill up at Belgian gas stations as pump prices in the Netherlands stay significantly higher than in Belgium, ABN AMRO bank reported.
description_zh: 荷兰银行 (ABN AMRO) 报告称，由于荷兰的汽油价格远高于比利时，越来越多的荷兰驾车者选择跨境到比利时加油站加油。

title: Former prosecutor’s office employee jailed for child sex abuse material, GHB possession
title_zh: 前检察官办公室雇员因持有儿童性虐待材料和GHB被判入狱。
description: A 52-year-old former Public Prosecution Service (OM) employee from Doetinchem has been sentenced to two years in prison for possessing and sharing child sexual abuse material and for possession of
description_zh: 一名来自杜廷赫姆、现年52岁的前公共检察署（OM）雇员因持有和传播儿童性虐待材料以及持有……而被判处两年监禁。

title: Rotterdam eases rules for hospitality venues during 2026 FIFA World Cup
title_zh: 鹿特丹放宽了2026年国际足联世界杯期间招待场所的规定
description: Rotterdam will ease regulations for bars, restaurants, and events during the World Cup, Mayor Carola Schouten told the city council in a letter.
description_zh: 鹿特丹市长卡罗拉·舒滕在一封致市议会的信中表示，世界杯期间，鹿特丹将放宽对酒吧、餐馆和活动的规定。

title: More than 3,300 awarded Royal honors on Friday; Rotterdam leading, gender gap narrowing
title_zh: 周五，超过3300人获得皇家荣誉；鹿特丹领先，性别差距缩小
description: Some 3,300 Royal honors were handed out to those in the Netherlands who have become important supporters of society.
description_zh: 荷兰向约 3300 位对社会做出重要贡献的人士颁发了皇家荣誉。
